title: The Knight of the Rose
writer: Louis Nerz, Robert Wiene, Hugo von Hofmannsthal
actors: Michael Bohnen, Huguette Duflos, Paul Hartmann
plot: While her husband illustrated himself in the war, the Maréchale de Werdenberg took comfort in the arms of the young Octavian and tried to arrange the affairs of his cousin, the Baron Ochs, by introducing him to a young girl.
